ns0:entry.ns0:title: JSONbored/awesome-claude
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JSONbored/awesome-claude
Language: mdx
HeyClaude is a curated registry and distribution surface for Claude and AI-workflow assets: agents, MCP servers, skills, commands, hooks, rules, guides, tools, jobs, Raycast feeds, static data exports, and an npm MCP package.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaperMC/docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaperMC/docs
Language: mdx
Documentation for all projects under the PaperMC umbrella.

Language: mdx

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
Language: mdx
🐙 Guides, papers, lessons, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering, context engineering, RAG, and AI Agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deepset-ai/haystack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deepset-ai/haystack
Language: mdx
Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing, memory, and generation. Built for scalable agents, RAG, multimodal applications, semantic search, and conversational systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: enactic/openarm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/enactic/openarm
Language: mdx
A fully open-source humanoid arm for physical AI research and deployment in contact-rich environments.
